name: LED A19 Bulb – 12 Watt – Energy Star and UL listed.
description: ZION LED USA bulb is also energy-efficient, consuming less electricity than traditional bulbs and has a longer lifespan, reducing the need for frequent replacements. The A19 shape is a standard shape for many light fixtures, making this LED bulb a versatile and practical choice for different applications.
short_desc: Specifications: Wattage: 12W Lumen: 1080 Lm Lumens Efficacy: 95 LM/Watt Adjustable CCT: 6500K Dimmable: Yes Housing Color: White Base Type: E26 Operating Temperature: -4F TO 113 F Watt Equivalent: 100W Beam Angle: 230 D Outdoor Rated: No Height: 4.2 IN Weight: 0.15 LBS Certification: UL Listed CRI: >80 Diameter: 2.4 Dimension: 4.7*2.78 Life Hours: 50000 Application: Indoor Voltage: 120V AC Warranty: 1 year
